headline: A Look At Textron (TXT) Valuation As Growth Programs Meet Cooling Share Price Momentum
summary: What Textron’s recent share performance tells you Textron (TXT) shares recently closed at US$87.96, leaving the stock with a small gain over the past month but a negative return over the past 3 months and past week. Over the past year, the stock’s total return sits at 26.9%, with longer term total returns over 3 and 5 years at 31.6% and 34.9%. Year to date, Textron’s move is modestly positive. See our latest analysis for Textron. Textron’s recent 1 day and 90 day share price declines,...
